channel.title: DeskRest
channel.description:
Bugfixes

  • Fixed notifications occasionally being cut off and not fully visible
  • Fixed fade-out animation on break screen only showing on one monitor when multiple displays are connected
  • Fixed notifications remaining visible after timer expiration
  • Fixed Working Hours stopping the break timer, requiring the user to tap Skip to exit the break screen

Improvements

  • Improved app performance during notification animations
  • Improved cursor reminder to fix lag
  • Exercises are now reshuffled randomly each day to avoid repeating the same order
  • Improved database stability

View release preview on GitHub
